title: How can I request for data from only ONE or two columns using GraphQL?

posts.author: jasmined (Jasmine Dsouza)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is my query:
query {
boards (ids: [2421382073]) {
items {
id
name
column_values {
id
title
value
}
}
}
}

But I am not able to figure out how to get column_values ONLY for one column (“Assigned To”)

Thank you!

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @jasmined

You can specify the columnId(s) in the query, in between column_values and the opening {

column_values (ids:“the_id_of_your_column”) {
